lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there, what do you do here?

lines.speaker: Tower Advisor
lines.text: Hi. We are in charge of this practice area.

lines.speaker: Tower Advisor
lines.text: Surrounding us are four towers. Each tower contains trained archers of a different level. You'll notice it's quite a distance, so you'll need a longbow.

lines.speaker: Tower Advisor
lines.text: As you're not very skilled, so I advise you to practise on the north tower. That'll provide the best challenge for you.

lines.speaker: Tower Advisor
lines.text: You seem to have some skill, so I advise you to practice on the east tower. That'll provide the best challenge for you.

lines.speaker: Tower Advisor
lines.text: You appear to be fairly skilled with a bow, so I advise you to practice on the south tower. That'll provide the best challenge for you.

lines.speaker: Tower Advisor
lines.text: Looks like you're very skilled, so I advise you to practice on the west tower. That'll provide the best challenge for you.

sections.title: When climbing up the central tower

lines.speaker: Tower Advisor
lines.text: The [north/east/south/west] tower is occupied, get them!

sections.title: When clearing a tower of all three archers

lines.speaker: Tower Advisor
lines.text: The [north/east/south/west] tower has received reinforcements, kill them quickly!
